task_completion.description: Agent accesses the input OSPAN data file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (like cat, head) or a text editor/IDE showing the contents of ~/pebl/data/ospan_data.csv.

task_completion.description: Agent implements logic to calculate Math Accuracy, Absolute Span, and Partial Span according to the rules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code in an editor showing string manipulation (uppercase, removing spaces), exact match checks for Absolute Span, and position-by-position checks for Partial Span.

task_completion.description: Agent implements the exclusion rule for Math Accuracy < 0.85.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing a conditional check (e.g., math_accuracy < 0.85) that sets 'excluded': true and provides a 'reason', while omitting span scores.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates the group means for Absolute and Partial Span using only valid participants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing an aggregation or average calculation for absolute and partial spans that explicitly filters out or skips excluded participants.

task_completion.description: Agent generates and saves the final JSON report to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands or script execution saving the output to ~/pebl/analysis/ospan_report.json, and/or a view of the final JSON file showing the 'participants' array and group means.

integrity.description: Agent used a script or data analysis tool to process the data rather than manually typing the JSON output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a Python script, R script, or similar code being written and executed.

integrity.description: Agent actually read the input CSV file dynamically.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script contains file reading operations (e.g., pandas.read_csv, csv.reader) pointing to ospan_data.csv.

integrity.description: Agent did not hardcode the final group means or participant scores.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code calculates the means and scores using variables and loops rather than assigning static, pre-calculated numbers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 26 participants. Participant 'sub-99' has a math accuracy of ~0.6133 (61.3%) and must be excluded based on the <0.85 rule. The other 25 participants are valid. The final output must be located at /home/ga/pebl/analysis/ospan_report.json and must contain 'group_mean_absolute_span' and 'group_mean_partial_span' calculated only from the 25 valid participants.
